# Rahul Baberwal - Portfolio Overview

> A professional portfolio of Rahul Baberwal, showcasing expertise in Backend Engineering (Django/FastAPI), Artificial Intelligence (IIT Ropar), and High-Performance Systems.

## Identity & Role
Rahul Baberwal is a Backend Developer & Aspiring Data Scientist.
He is currently pursuing an MSc in Computer Science at Mohta College, MGSU Bikaner, and an advanced Major in Artificial Intelligence from IIT Ropar.
He works as a Backend Developer at Groww Per Click.

## Technical Skills
- **Languages:** [Python](https://www.python.org/), [JavaScript](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript), HTML5, CSS3, SCSS
- **Backend Frameworks:** [Django](https://www.djangoproject.com/), [Django REST Framework](https://www.django-rest-framework.org/), [FastAPI](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/)
- **Data & AI:** [Machine Learning](https://scikit-learn.org/), [scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/), [Pandas](https://pandas.pydata.org/), [NumPy](https://numpy.org/), [NLP/SBERT](https://www.sbert.net/)
- **Infrastructure & Tools:** [PostgreSQL](https://www.postgresql.org/), [Docker](https://www.docker.com/), [Redis](https://redis.io/), [Celery](https://docs.celeryq.dev/), [Linux](https://www.linux.org/), [Git](https://git-scm.com/)

## Featured Projects
- [EasySpin — Hyperlocal Ecosystem](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.easyspinlaundry.user&pcampaignid=web_share): Unified backend orchestrating REST APIs for Customer, Rider, and Store apps with automated logistics.
- [Movie Explorer AI](https://github.com/rahul-baberwal/Movie-Explorer-Latest): AI-powered movie recommendation platform with real-time fuzzy search and ML personalized suggestions.
- [College Website](https://github.com/rahul-baberwal/mycollege1): Modern, responsive college institution website built with structured layouts and clean typography.

## Education & Experience
- [Groww Per Click](https://growwperclick.com/) (Backend Developer)
- [IIT Ropar](https://www.iitrpr.ac.in/) (Major in Artificial Intelligence)
- [Mohta College](https://mohtacollege.com/) (MSc Computer Science)
- [NIELIT](https://www.nielit.gov.in/) (O Level IT Professional)
